tasks.title: Validate frontend toolchain
tasks.details: Check Node, npm, Rust, and Cargo availability for Vite + Tauri setup.

tasks.title: Scaffold Vite React frontend
tasks.details: Create a React + TypeScript app in gui/ and install dependencies.

tasks.title: Add Tauri desktop shell
tasks.details: Initialize src-tauri and wire Tauri config to run the Vite frontend.

tasks.title: Implement Python simulation bridge
tasks.details: Create Tauri commands that run Python demo scripts and return structured output.

tasks.title: Build QIG control panel UI
tasks.details: Add UI to run simulations, show status, and display output logs.

tasks.title: Document and verify workflow
tasks.details: Add run/build instructions and execute smoke checks.

tasks.title: Add charting dependency
tasks.details: Install a chart library for plotting parsed simulation metrics in the desktop UI.

tasks.title: Implement structured output parsing
tasks.details: Parse simulation stdout into typed metric series and key-value summaries.

tasks.title: Render simulation charts
tasks.details: Add responsive charts and metric cards to visualize parsed output in the frontend.

tasks.title: Add live run timeline
tasks.details: Show simulation phases with active/completed/error states during execution and at completion.

result.behavior: Animated step progression during run + result-aware final state mapping

tasks.title: Add scenario presets and story mode
tasks.details: Create one-click simulation scenarios with contextual narrative labels and guided progression.

tasks.title: Add 3D metric space view
tasks.details: Introduce interactive 3D visualization for geometry and metric relationships.

tasks.title: Add comparative run mode
tasks.details: Support side-by-side run comparison with metric deltas and highlights.

tasks.title: Add export-ready reports
tasks.details: Generate shareable reports from run results with charts and metadata.

tasks.title: Build parameter studio
tasks.details: Add tunable run controls for qubits, scheduling budgets, and compiler/geometry knobs.

result.bridge: Tauri run_simulation now accepts parameters payload and forwards env vars

tasks.title: Expand motion system
tasks.details: Introduce meaningful transitions tied to simulation state changes and results.

additions: shimmer-slide keyframe on run-button while isRunning
staggered fade-up on metric-card (8-step), chart-card (3-step), delta-card (8-step)

tasks.title: Create design system layer
tasks.details: Refactor style tokens into a reusable design-system structure for consistency.

tasks.title: Add advanced theme packs
tasks.details: Extend theme selector with presentation-ready packs and chart-specific palettes.

result.presentation_mode: toggle chip in hero, bumps font sizes, chart height 320px

tasks.title: Add reliability UX panel
tasks.details: Expose environment diagnostics, recoverable errors, and guided remediation actions.

result.panel: Reliability & Diagnostics — bottom panel, always visible
result.guided_recovery: Per-issue guidance cards with actionable steps
result.function: analyzeReliability() — pure function, no new Tauri commands
